message.content:
For **reliable, good‑value tools for home use**, these brands are consistently solid without being overpriced:

• **Stanley** – Very good for screwdrivers, measuring tapes, and general hand tools. Affordable and durable.  
• **Bosch (Green line)** – Excellent for home‑use drills and power tools; reliable and user‑friendly.  
• **Makita** – Higher quality than basic homeowner brands but still accessible; great for drills.  
• **DeWalt** – Strong, durable tools; good if you want something a bit more “pro” without going overboard.  
• **Knipex** – Best pliers in the consumer market, though slightly pricier.  
• **Wiha / Wera** – Excellent screwdrivers if you want something better than Stanley.

If you want a simple all‑around setup without overthinking it:  
• Stanley for hand tools (screwdrivers, pliers, tape measure)  
• Bosch or Makita for the drill

That combo covers most home projects with dependable quality.
